content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.94%, Bank Nifty +0.97%, Realty +2.6%, Metals +1.39%, Pharma +0.98%, Auto +0.97%. VIX down -2.87% to 17.93 confirming risk-on sentiment. Most existing positions in green; opportunity to trail SLs aggressively to lock gains while letting winners run.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24290
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.4% with strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, +36% disbursements). VWAP 1051 holding as support; CMP 1047. Current SL 1040 is fine but tightening to 1030 (below intraday low 1045 minus buffer) — wait, actually 1030 is BELOW current SL 1040 which would be loosening, rejected. Keeping SL at 1040, no MODIFY needed. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction to my prior reasoning: SL 1040 already at solid support; loosening would be rejected and tightening above LTP 1047 leaves no room. Hold SL at 1040, target 1110 intact. Strong Q4 results, sector tailwind."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.1%, CMP 122.58 vs SL 119. Macro hedge thesis intact even as VIX cools — gold ETF is portfolio insurance, not a momentum trade. SL 119 below recent support; thesis not broken. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY (SL=1810 already, target=1880 already). Cancelling — emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +5.0%, CMP 1823 made 52w high 1841 today then faded. SL 1810 is just below CMP — gap is 0.7%, within normal noise but tight enough to lock gains. Q4 results May 19 binary event approaching; SL near breakeven-plus is appropriate event hedge. Will reassess closer to results to either tighten further or exit ahead per binary-event rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8%, CMP 24.12 vs SL 23.85. Gap 1.1% — adequate breathing room. Pharma sector strong today. Holding ETF SL where it is; tighter would risk noise stopout."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 944.00,
      "new_target": 1010.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, CMP 959.30, breakout day on Q4 beat (PAT +23%, AUM Rs 5L cr milestone). SL at breakeven 944 is appropriate. Raising target to 1010 to capture brokerage TP 1050 vicinity; risk 15.3, reward 50.7, R:R 3.3 — comfortable. Keep SL same (no MODIFY-down risk since equal); only target raised."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.6%, CMP 1738, broke out to fresh 52w high (today 1742 vs prior 1672). Trailing SL up from 1700 to 1710 (still 1.6% below CMP, adequate gap >0.5% per trail-gap discipline). Locks in modest gain while letting breakout run. Target 1790 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.1%, CMP 1537 faded from intraday high 1600 to 1524. Q4 results May 8 (4 trading days away) — binary event within 3 sessions actually closer. Per binary-event rule, should consider trim/tighten. SL at 1510 = 1.8% below CMP, already tight. Holding through with tight SL acts as option (b) tightened SL. Position size ~4.6% of capital, below 5% threshold so binary-event rule allows hold. Will reassess Friday if not results day."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.0%, CMP 13684 faded from intraday high 13976. Bullish setup (record April wholesales, Victoris ICOTY) intact but profit-taking after gap up. SL 13400 = 2.1% below CMP. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9%, CMP 10205 faded sharply from intraday high 10477 (shooting-star intraday). May 6 board meeting (2 trading days) — Q4 + buyback + dividend triple catalyst. BINARY EVENT WITHIN 3 SESSIONS. Position is ~5.1% of capital, just above 5% threshold. SL 10100 = 1.0% below CMP, already tight per option (b). Keeping tight SL through event; if results disappoint, SL caps tail. If buyback announced, target 10800 likely hit. Acceptable event-trade asymmetry."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BHEL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Skipping — no full data block provided in deep dive. Cannot form valid setup."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1040 at appropriate support level. Trim to 1040 already locks +5.7% gain. Tightening further risks noise stopout below VWAP 1051."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; tolerate -2% drawdown within original SL 119."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1810 already tight at -0.7% from CMP; locks +4.4% gain. Will reassess closer to May 19 binary."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "ETF, low volatility, SL 23.85 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 944 appropriate after Q4 beat. Target raised to 1010 in decisions."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high breakout; trail SL from 1700 to 1710, gap 1.6% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL 1510 already in place ahead of May 8 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 below today's low 13549 minus buffer. Bullish thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL 10100 caps event-tail risk into May 6 board meeting; buyback upside asymmetric."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ANANTRAJ pending BUY @506 still OPEN from earlier — CMP 510.25 has run above the limit. NOT stacking a new order per ORDER HYGIENE. Will let it expire or fill on a pullback. May 11 board meeting is a binary event within ~5 sessions — if it doesn't fill by EOD May 5, will cancel to avoid event exposure on a position not yet established. BAJAJ-AUTO already held; no add into May 6 binary. BHEL/HAL/RRKABEL — no full data block provided in deep dive, can't size properly today; revisit next pulse. LALPATHLAB +16.83% is a one-day catalyst spike with no clear trigger surfaced; chasing 52w-high after such a vertical move violates risk discipline. CONCORDBIO BEARISH research (Citi -23% EPS cut) overrides the volume signal — pass. SYNGENE/ASTERDM/LAURUSLABS already up 5-9% intraday — reward/risk into close is poor; watch for orderly retest of 9-EMA before considering. CESC, FLUOROCHEM — no data block, revisit.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 47%, cash 53% — comfortable. Book is well-diversified: 2 financial (PNBHOUSING, BAJFINANCE), 2 pharma (SUNPHARMA, PHARMABEES), 2 auto (MARUTI, BAJAJ-AUTO), 1 logistics (ADANIPORTS), 1 shipping (GESHIP), 1 hedge (GOLDBEES). No single sector >20%. Three binary events in next 4-9 sessions: BAJAJ-AUTO May 6, GESHIP May 8 (~4 days), SUNPHARMA May 19. All three carry tight SLs as event-tail caps per binary-event rule. Auto cluster (MARUTI + BAJAJ-AUTO) is ~10% of capital — within cluster discipline. ANANTRAJ pending order needs explicit cancel decision tomorrow if unfilled given its May 11 binary. Today's net unrealized +1.1% is decent; focus is letting winners run with trailed SLs rather than fresh entries chasing extended intraday moves."
}
